content.en:
The true corpse of this invincible Dao Ancestor Green Yin turned into a world, and although the core torso in front of him was only a part of the body, and it had been dead for a long time, its coercion was still extremely terrifying.

Ye Tian's blood-colored figure is transformed by the other party's memory, and it has the same aura of the other party, so the coercion it has been reduced by I don't know how many times, if Ye Tian's body comes, I am afraid that it will be suppressed by this coercion and it will be difficult to move.

This is the horror of the coercion of the strong, even if it falls for endless years, it is not something that the weak can bear.

Ye Tian advanced step by step, approaching the corpse of the Green Yin Dao Ancestor.

The other memories didn't dare to approach the corpse of the Green Dao Ancestor due to instinct, but Ye Tian didn't care, he was not a real memory, so he naturally dared to approach.

But even if it was the same source, the coercion in the dark still stopped Ye Tian.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian really approached the corpse of the Green Yin Dao Ancestor, and one hand touched the Green Yin Dao Ancestor.

At this moment, a terrifying force poured into Ye Tian's blood-colored figure.

At the same time, pictures poured into Ye Tian's mind in the form of memories.

Countless memories emerged, and finally froze in the most profound picture, which was the picture of the Green Dao Ancestor fighting with a mysterious being whose face could not be seen clearly.

It's better to say that it is difficult to resist than to fight.

A chaotic void.

Lu Yin Dao Ancestor looked at it with a solemn face, only to see the void of hundreds of millions of chaotic realms tumbling up, and a figure slowly approached.

I saw that there seemed to be a majestic domain realm phantom suspended behind the comer, and the terrifying aura made the Chaos Avenue retreat, and all the rules changed with the other party's every move.

He is the master of the avenue, the maker of the rules, and the source of everything.

Ye Tian couldn't describe the greatness of this person, just the phantom of the memory made him freeze all over, and he couldn't say anything.

Obviously, this is a domain ancestor!

"Green Yin Dao Ancestor, you shouldn't have violated that taboo, originally you had a thirty percent hope of being promoted to a domain ancestor and becoming an existence equal to us, qualified to jump out of the domain realm and explore the real world. It's a pity that you have violated the taboo, and the Divine Heaven Realm cannot tolerate you, and I cannot tolerate you. Today, you will surely die!"

The Mysterious Domain Ancestor spoke.

"Hahaha, it's just that I've discovered your secret, what taboos, what can't be tolerated, it's ridiculous!" Lu Yin Daozu roared angrily.

The Mysterious Domain Ancestor was reluctant to say more, and with one finger crossed the endless time and space, shattered hundreds of millions of territories, and suppressed it.

And the Green Dao Ancestor turned into a body of a divine tree the size of 100,000 universes, trying to resist this finger.

However, a finger pierced his body, and the body of his divine tree began to crack.

This blow made the Green Yin Dao Ancestor realize the gap between him and the Domain Ancestor, even if he had reached the extreme of the Dao Ancestor and spied a trace of the mystery of the Domain Ancestor, he was still not the Domain Ancestor.

What's more, the other party was not a newcomer to the Domain Ancestor, and he was not a powerful existence that he could match.

So, Lu Yin Daozu fled.

He tore through infinite time and space, and life-saving things protected his body, but it was still difficult to resist the mysterious domain ancestor.

Just as he was about to fall, a mysterious hand reached out of the void and stopped the mysterious place for him.

It was such an opportunity that allowed the Green Dao Ancestor to successfully escape and blend into a domain realm.

Soon, all the memories were transferred.

"Yu Zu is so powerful!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

He couldn't see the appearance of Yu Zu from his memory at all, and even the traces of Yu Zu's shot were extremely blurry, but the wisps of the other party's breath even made it difficult for him to resist through memory.

Such a terrifying existence was enough to kill him countless times with a wisp of breath, even his master, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, was no different from an ant in front of such an existence.

Ye Tian, who originally thought that he was very strong, realized his weakness at this moment, and his little strength took advantage of the fact that the Quasi-Dao Realm could not descend to a powerful existence, so he was just reckless.

Not to mention compared to the Domain Ancestor, any top-notch True Ancestor could kill him in seconds at any time.

Low profile!

It has to be low-key!

Immediately, Ye Tian smiled again.

This time, he not only saw the battle at the level of the domain ancestor, even if it was just a memory picture, but it also inspired him a lot.

Moreover, he has obtained the memory inheritance of an invincible Dao Ancestor, which contains a lot of precious knowledge and a few Dao techniques.

It's just that this memory inheritance is still very lacking, and in a real sense, it is only a small part of the memory of the Green Dao Ancestor, and it is not worth mentioning compared to the overall memory.

But this memory helped Ye Tian too much, and it also had great benefits for him to create his own exercises in the future.

Ye Tian didn't collect the torso of the Green Yin Dao Ancestor, not because he didn't want to collect it, but because he couldn't collect it.

This torso is almost the core pillar of this world, closely connected to the whole world, and it is almost unrealistic for him to want to shake the whole world with his little power.

Even if a Dao Ancestor came here, there would be no way to take this torso, and it would even cause the power of the entire world to suppress it, and the explosion of power of the invincible Dao Ancestor for countless years was enough to kill a Dao Ancestor of the Four or Five Heavens.

However, in general, Ye Tian was already very satisfied.

A memory inheritance, copy the talent to upgrade.

These two benefits alone were enough to make Ye Tian's future bright.

Then, Ye Tian's blood-colored figure body left here and returned to the place where the main body was.

Next, Ye Tian left this inheritance space, returned to the Life God Mountain, and began to look for other guard-level Life Green Clans.

......

"I've already found two Life Stones, I'm lucky, I'll leave if I find another one!"

Green Peak said in a low voice.

He is a guard-level from the Green God City of the Life Green Clan, and the Green God City is the second tree city of the Life Green Clan.

He is also one of the top geniuses of the generation of the Life Green Clan, and his luck has always been very good, not long after entering the Life Divine Mountain, he harvested two Life Sacred Stones.

Under normal circumstances, a Guardian level only needs one Life Stone to be sufficient, but the additional Life Stone can be handed over to the clan in exchange for more resources.

Of course, under normal circumstances, if a guard-level person finds the Life Sacred Stone, he must leave as soon as possible, otherwise he will be robbed by others, and it will be over.

The competition between the Life Green Clan is very serious, and it is also common to fight each other within the Life God Mountain, but as long as they don't kill each other and only plunder each other's belongings, the impact is not very great.

Green Feng was very confident in his own strength, and he also believed that no one would dare to hit his attention, so he was not in a hurry to leave the Life God Mountain.

However, there were only so many Life Sacred Stones in the Life God Mountain, and he was lucky to be able to find two, and it was not easy to find one more.

A few hours passed, and Green Peak came to a valley.

Suddenly, he sensed the fluctuation of the Life Sacred Stone, and immediately became excited.

"I've found another one, I'm so lucky!"

Green Peak said excitedly.

He walked over and had just picked up the Life Stone.

At this moment, the void froze, and a figure appeared.

Then, he lost consciousness and his entire body turned into powder.

This figure was Ye Tian, he used his copying talent to sense the existence of Green Peak, so he rushed here and instantly killed him with the Dao technique of Splitting the Sky Technique.

"Hey, I also harvested three Life Sacred Stones, good luck!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Immediately, there was suddenly an extra person beside him, and it was 'Green Peak'.

Of course, this is not the real Green Peak, but the Green Peak that he copied, whether it is in terms of breath, life fluctuations, soul, and talent, it is exactly the same as the Green Peak.

The only difference is memory!

I saw that with a wave of his hand, 'Green Peak' took Ye Tian into the inner world, completely hidden, and then Green Peak flew towards the outside of the Life God Mountain.
